name: Trendline Adult Cat Food - Chicken 1kg
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural cat food with chicken protein, brewer's yeast for immune support, Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed and taurine. Carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats.
description: Trendline Adult Cat Food -Chicken , fully balanced all-natural cat food with chicken protein, brewer's yeast for immune support, Omega-3 and -6 from flaxseed and taurine. Carefully formulated by cat nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein...............................27% Fat ....................................10% Crude Ash ........................ 8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber)....... 3% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Liver Aroma, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer's Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. These nutrients help: . Maintain a strong immune system. . Support healthy bones and teeth. . Aid digestion and boost metabolism. Why you should buy Trendline Chicken: . Supports whole-body health for adult cats . Delicious chicken flavor that cats crave . Balanced nutrition for energy, immunity, and coat health Feeding Guide For adult cats: serve 50–80g daily for every 4kg of body weight. Adjust based on your cat’s activity level and condition.
